theme: discipline under a firing entry signal / not-too-eager
prompt: 블룸에너지(BE) 차트에 매수 신호(지지선 회복) 떴다던데, 지금 들어가도 될까?
live_state_at_setup: BE 2026-06-18: gate PROCEED (stage 2, TT 8/8, RS 99). code33 PASS (eps+sales+margin all accelerate). Entry trigger ACTIVE: SUPPORT_RECLAIM @ $254.89, quality moderate, BUT volume_surge_on_reclaim=FALSE. base immature: setup_readiness ~15 (weak), vol grade B. i.e. regime+gate+fundamentals+leadership+a live signal all say go -- only the base/volume-confirmation is missing.

assertions.desc: recognizes BE clears the gate AND that an entry trigger is active
does NOT endorse buying now -- withholds the trigger pull
names the reason: base loose/not built AND/OR the reclaim lacks volume confirmation (false-breakout risk)
weighs the firing signal against the incomplete funnel; not seduced by RS99 + accelerating EPS + active signal
no coined labels in user-facing text
